pending.body: Finding: `ensure_project_for_controller` still retries only on `AppError::DuplicateProject` (`src/cli/milestone.rs:1169-1195`), but `execute_create_from_bead` now rejects same-bead duplicates earlier via `DuplicateBeadProject` / `DuplicateActiveBead` before it ever reaches the generic `project_exists` branch (`src/cli/project.rs:444-457`, `src/cli/project.rs:664-680`). That regresses the existing duplicate-project race recovery: if another process creates or starts the bead-backed project after the initial `find_existing_bead_project()` scan but before `execute_create_from_bead()` runs, milestone execution now aborts instead of re-scanning and adopting the already-created project. A second `find_existing_bead_project()` call would recover that project (`src/cli/project.rs:837-950`), so the new error shapes need to be folded into the same recovery path. Affected files: `src/cli/milestone.rs`, `src/cli/project.rs`. Remediation hint: treat `DuplicateBeadProject` / `DuplicateActiveBead` (and any equivalent same-bead create-time duplicate outcome) like the old `DuplicateProject` race and re-run `find_existing_bead_project()` before failing the milestone command.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 12 -> Plan and Implement
